curation.synopsis: Sabbat Worlds Crusade companion novel to Gaunt's Ghosts, taking the Crusade to the skies above Enothis. The elite Phantine XX fighter wing — including Commander Bree Jagdea — arrives on the desert-coast war-front in a desperate hour, with Chaos air forces driving Imperial cover off the planet and threatening to wipe out the remaining human population. Dual POV across the dogfighting line: Phantine pilots flying Thunderbolt and Marauder aircraft on one side, the infamous Chaos ace Khrel Kas Obarkon and his Hell-Talon squadrons hunting the skies on the other. Cast across both sides is large (squadron-mate ensembles, ground crew, and PDF aviator allies). A 'Battle of Britain in space' register — sustained aerial combat, attrition, pilot psychology, and the strategic stakes of holding the air corridor that the Crusade's ground forces depend on. Carries the same Sabbat-Worlds geopolitics as the Gaunt's Ghosts arc but anchors on the Imperial Navy / Phantine-aviation axis rather than the Tanith First-and-Only.
